maay_maay.pre_formatted_smart_goals_for_iep_team: Yoolal SMART oo horay loo qaabeeyay kooxaha IEP. Yool kastaa wuxuu ku xiran yahay heer CCSS, wuxuu soo jeediyaa ilaha xogta la-socodka-horumarka ee AlloFlow, wuxuuna liis gareeyaa habraacyada caadiga. Koobi oo u habee ardeygaaga.

maay_maay.the_earliest_fraction_notation_dates_t: Qoraalka qeybta ugu horreeya wuxuu dib u tegaa Masar hore qiyaastii 1800 BCE. Masaaridu waxay isticmaaleen "qeyb halbeeg" — kaliya qeybaha tirada koorta 1 (sida 1/2, 1/3, 1/4). Qeyb kasta oo kale waxay u qoreen wadar qeyb halbeeg: 2/5 = 1/3 + 1/15. Qoraalka baarka casriga (tirada koorta oo ka koorreeya tirada hoosta) wuxuu ka yimid xisaabyahannada Carabta ee dhexe qiyaastii 1200 CE.
maay_maay.numerator_comes_from_the_latin_numerar: "Numerator" wuxuu ka yimid Laatiinka "numerare" (in la tiriyo) — wuxuu tiriyaa immisa qeybood. "Denominator" wuxuu ka yimid "denominare" (in la magacaabo) — wuxuu magacawdaa cabbirka qeybaha. Wadajir: tirada hoosta waxay magacawdaa nooca goynta; tirada koorta waxay tirisaa immisa goyn oo kuwaas ah oo aad haysato.
maay_maay.decimals_as_we_know_them_were_populari: Decimalka sida aan u naqaan waxaa caan ka dhigay Simon Stevin 1585 buuggiisa "De Thiende" (Toban). Ka hor taas, qeybuhu waxay ahaayeen kaliya habka lagu muujiyo tirooyinka aan dhameyn. Dhibicda decimal waxay noqotay mid caalami ah oo la aqbalay kaliya 1700-meeyadii.
maay_maay.percent_comes_from_the_latin_per_centu: "Percent" wuxuu ka yimid Laatiinka "per centum" — "boqolkii." Sidaa darteed 25% macnaheedu waa 25 boqolkii, ama 25/100. Calaamadda % waxay ka soo baxday soo-gaabinta "per c." ee qoraalka ganacsi ee Talyaaniga qarnigii 15aad.
maay_maay.the_reciprocal_of_a_b_is_b_a_flip_it_u: Reciprocalka a/b waa b/a — rogo. Qeyb kasta oo aan eber ahayn wuxuu leeyahay reciprocal. Badeecada qeybta iyo reciprocalkeeda mar walba waa 1: (3/4) × (4/3) = 12/12 = 1. Taas awgeed u qeybinta qeyb la mid tahay isku-dhufashada reciprocalkeeda.
maay_maay.why_is_1_2_the_most_used_fraction: Maxay 1/2 u tahay qeybta ugu badan la isticmaalo?
maay_maay.1_2_is_the_most_common_fraction_in_eve: 1/2 waa qeybta ugu caansan hadalka maalinlaha sababtoo ah waxay si dhab ah u fadhiisaa dhexda 0 iyo 1. Waxay kaloo tahay qeybta kaliya ee aan si joogto u muujino erayo: "badh" halkii "mid ka koorreeya laba." Luqadaha kale waxay leeyihiin erayo gaar ah 1/3 iyo 1/4 sidoo kale (saddex meelood, rubuc).
maay_maay.a_pizza_is_a_perfect_fraction_model_be: Pizza waa qaab qeyb oo qumman sababtoo ah waa goobo (sidaa darteed dhammaan goynyaha waxay ka soo baxaan xarunta), goynyaha way fududahay in la tiriyo, qaabkuna wuxuu waafaqsan yahay qeexitaanka xisaabeed ee rasmiga: qeyb n/d waa n qeybood oo siman oo ka mid ah wadarta d qeybood oo siman.
maay_maay.some_numbers_like_and_2_cannot_be_writ: Tirooyin qaar, sida π iyo √2, laguma qori karo qeyb laba tiro oo dhan. Kuwan waxaa loo yaqaan tirooyin aan macquul ahayn. Pythagoreans (qiyaastii 500 BCE) waxaa la sheegay inay dileen xisaabyahankii Hippasus markuu caddeeyay in √2 aan loo qori karin qeyb.
maay_maay.any_real_number_can_be_written_as_a_co: Tiro dhab ah kastaa waxaa loo qori karaa "qeyb socda" — qeyb ku dhex jira sida 1 + 1/(2 + 1/(2 + 1/(2 + ...))). Tani waxay bixisaa qiyaasaha qeybta ugu fiican. π ≈ 22/7 laga bilaabo erayada koowaad ee yar; mid ka sii fiican waa 355/113.
maay_maay.musical_pitch_ratios_are_fractions_the: Saamiyada cod-dhawaaqa muusikada waa qeybo. Octave waa saami 2:1 (dhawaaqu wuu labanlaabmaa). Shanaadka qumman waa 3:2. Saddexaadka wayn waa 5:4. Pythagoras wuxuu ogaaday in saamiyada tirada dhan ee fudud ay soo saaraan cod-dhawaaqyo isku waafaqsan.
maay_maay.two_pizzas_can_only_be_combined_if_the: Laba pizza waxaa la isku dari karaa kaliya haddii loo goo goyn isku cabbir ah. Tiro hoosta kala duwan = goyn cabbir kala duwan = si toos looma isku dari karo. Tirada hoosta guud macneheedu waa dhab ahaan "goyn isku cabbir ah."
maay_maay.a_batting_average_like_333_means_1_3_o: Celceliska garaaca sida .333 macnaheedu waa 1/3 garaacyada ayaa keena garaac. ERA-da tuuraha, boqolkiiba-saldhig, boqolkiiba-garaac — dhammaantood waa qeybo. Baseball wuxuu ahaa ciyaarta ugu horreeya ee caan ka dhigtay nooca fikirka tirakoobka, laga bilaabo 1850meeyadii.
maay_maay.georges_cuisenaire_was_a_belgian_prima: Georges Cuisenaire wuxuu ahaa macallin dugsi hoose oo Beljam ah 1950meeyadii kaas oo abuuray ulo midab leh oo dherer 1 ilaa 10 si uu carruurta uga caawiyo inay qabsadaan xiriirka tirooyinka oo ay ku jiraan qeybaha. "Deyrka qeybta" ee aad ku aragto fasallo badan waa faraca dijital ee ulahiisa jireed.
maay_maay.the_chinese_mathematical_text_nine_cha: Qoraalka xisaabeed ee Shiinaha "Sagaal Cutub oo ku saabsan Farshaxanka Xisaabeed" (qiyaastii 100 BCE) wuxuu ku jiray xisaabinta qeybta, oo ay ku jirto nidaam lagu helo tirada hoosta guud oo xisaab ahaan la mid ah waxa aan maanta baranno.
maay_maay.computers_store_decimal_fractions_in_b: Kombuyuutarradu waxay kaydiyaan qeybaha decimalka binary. Decimalka 0.1 si sax looguma matali karo binary — wuxuu noqdaa qeyb soo noqnoqda saldhig 2. Taas awgeed 0.1 + 0.2 mararka qaarkood ku siiya 0.30000000000000004 luqadaha barnaamijyada.
maay_maay.dogs_spend_about_1_2_their_lives_sleep: Eeydu waxay ku bixiyaan qiyaastii 1/2 noloshooda hurdo. Ey 12 jir ah wuxuu hurday qiyaastii 6 sano.

maay_maay.let_your_number_be_n_the_sequence_n_1_: Ha tiradaadu ahaato n. Taxanaha: (n+1) × 2 + 4 − 6 = 2n + 2 + 4 − 6 = 2n. Qeybi 2 → n. Ka jar asalka → 0. Sug — taasi waxay siisaa 0, ma aha 1. Isku day: n → (n+1)×2 = 2n+2 → +4 = 2n+6 → −6 = 2n → ÷2 = n → −asalka = 0. "Xeeladdu" waxay ku tiirsan tahay constants qarsoon oo taxanaha ku jira.
maay_maay.each_term_is_half_the_previous_the_tot: Eray kastaa waa badh kii hore. Wadartu waxay u dhowaataa 1 laakiin weligeed ma gaadho. Kani waa taxane geometric aan dhammaad lahayn oo leh eray kowaad 1/2 iyo saami 1/2: S = (1/2) / (1 − 1/2) = 1. Taas awgeed paradox-ka dhaqdhaqaaqa ee Zeno xisaab ahaan loo xallin karaa.
maay_maay.even_though_each_term_is_small_the_ser: In kastoo eray kastaa yar yahay, taxanahu wuu kala firdhaa. Si aad u gaadho 100, waxaad u baahan tahay qiyaastii 1.5 × 10^43 eray. Tan waxaa caddeeyay Nicole Oresme 1300meeyadii isticmaalka kooxaynta: 1/3 + 1/4 > 1/4 + 1/4 = 1/2; 1/5+...+1/8 > 4 × 1/8 = 1/2; had iyo jeer waad heli kartaa 1/2 kale oo aad ku darto.
maay_maay.check_1_4_and_1_3_4_1_1_3_1_check_2_5_: Hubi 1/4 iyo 1/3: (4)(1) − (1)(3) = 1. Hubi 2/5 iyo 1/2: (5)(1) − (2)(2) = 1. Sifadan waxay abuurtaa geedka Stern-Brocot ee dhammaan tirooyinka macquulka.
maay_maay.rewrite_1_2_2_3_3_4_n_1_n_the_2_in_2_3: Dib u qor: 1/2 × 2/3 × 3/4 × ... × (n−1)/n. 2da ku jirta 2/3 waxay tirtirtaa 2da ku jirta tirada hoosta ee 1/2. 3da ku jirta 3/4 waxay tirtirtaa 3da ku jirta tirada hoosta ee 2/3. Wax kastaa waa la tirtiraa marka laga reebo 1/n.
maay_maay.mathematical_tricks_that_are_really_el: "Xeelado" xisaabeed oo dhab ahaantii ah aqoonsiyo qeyb oo qurux badan. Dooro mid si aad u aragto dejinta, muujinta, iyo sharraxaadda xisaabeed.
